message:
installer: initialize REMOVE_PREDECESSOR default

Ensures the variable is always set before being passed to
configure_claude_code(), avoiding empty string edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -408,6 +408,7 @@ echo ""
 PREDECESSOR_SCRIPT="git_safety_guard.py"
 PREDECESSOR_FOUND=0
 PREDECESSOR_LOCATIONS=()
+REMOVE_PREDECESSOR=1  # Default to removing predecessor if found
 
 detect_predecessor() {
   # Check common file locations
